notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

unsubscribe.confirm_intro: You are about to unsubscribe from the AInspiration newsletter.
unsubscribe.confirm_warning: You will no longer receive our AI news and industry trends.
unsubscribe.success_message: You have been successfully unsubscribed from our newsletter.
unsubscribe.success_note: We are sorry to see you go. You can re-subscribe at any time from our website.
unsubscribe.error_link_used: This unsubscribe link is no longer valid or has already been used.
unsubscribe.error_unsubscribe: Unable to unsubscribe you. Please contact support.
unsubscribe.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
